results.title: Mitie agrees to be bought by rival outsourcer in £3.1bn deal
results.description: Mitie has agreed to be bought by a rival outsourcer in a £3.1 billion deal, marking the latest in a spate of UK-listed companies to be taken off the stock market.

results.title: Return and Engie, EnBW and Zelestra agree long-term BESS tolls in Spain, Italy
results.description: Return and Engie have agreed a long-term BESS toll in Spain while EnBW and Zelestra have finalised one in Italy, totalling 55MW and 300MW of capacity respectively.
